name: modcrafting
description: A one-stop Minecraft mod development environment based on Vibecoding 基于Vibecoding的一站式Minecraft模组开发环境
author: newstarbar

scripts.build:win: electron-vite build && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --win nsis && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --config electron-builder.portable.json --win portable
scripts.build:win:portable: electron-vite build && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --config electron-builder.portable.json --win portable
scripts.test:harness: node --experimental-strip-types --test scripts/harness-plan-tracker.test.ts scripts/harness-turn-intent.test.ts scripts/harness-llm-providers.test.ts scripts/harness-template-params.test.ts scripts/harness-mc-run-ready.test.ts scripts/harness-tool-explore-group.test.ts scripts/harness-opencode-phase3.test.ts scripts/harness-aci-plan-repair.test.ts scripts/harness-engine-safety.test.ts scripts/harness-fabric-reliability.test.ts scripts/harness-session-resume.test.ts scripts/harness-project-info.test.ts scripts/harness-context-compact.test.ts scripts/harness-ask-clarification.test.ts scripts/harness-explore-write-deadlock.test.ts scripts/harness-app-badge.test.ts scripts/harness-mixin-path.test.ts scripts/harness-repair-budget.test.ts scripts/harness-yarn-descriptor.test.ts scripts/harness-list-directory-file.test.ts scripts/harness-false-success-guard.test.ts scripts/harness-mixin-handwritten.test.ts
scripts.prebuild:win: node scripts/generate-icon-ico.mjs && node scripts/generate-installer-assets.mjs && npm run prepare:renderer-assets && node scripts/setup-toolchain.mjs && node scripts/prefetch-fabric-deps.mjs && npm run generate:fabric-index && node scripts/prepare-seed-for-packaging.mjs && node scripts/archive-gradle-home-seed.mjs && node scripts/setup-nsisbi.mjs && node scripts/patch-nsis-install-ui.mjs
scripts.prebuild:win:setup: node scripts/generate-icon-ico.mjs && node scripts/generate-installer-assets.mjs && npm run prepare:renderer-assets && node scripts/setup-toolchain.mjs && node scripts/prefetch-fabric-deps.mjs && npm run generate:fabric-index && node scripts/prepare-seed-for-packaging.mjs && node scripts/archive-gradle-home-seed.mjs && node scripts/setup-nsisbi.mjs && node scripts/patch-nsis-install-ui.mjs
